reviews.text:
Stephanie Prater of Princess Productions truly brought our wedding celebration to life in the most beautiful way. She effortlessly captured my vision and executed it to perfection, even with the minimal guidance I was able to provide on the day of. Her creativity and attention to detail transformed the event into something beyond what I had imagined. So many people have seen photos of our celebration and immediately asked who was behind the planning. We are incredibly fortunate to have hired Stephanie—working with her was an absolute joy, and I can't recommend her enough!

Photography by Ashley Joyce Photography, Florals by Bramble and Bloom, Rentals by Lucky Penny Events

With Love,

Claudia & Donald
Unique concept weddings in beautiful Crested Butte Colorado and beyond!
